The '''Striker projectile pistol''' was a typical [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]] [[Pistol/Legends|pistol]] manufactured by [[Oriolanis Defense Systems/Legends|Oriolanis Defense Systems]].<ref name="EGWT" /> Considered to be durable but otherwise unimpressive,<ref name="AE" /> the Striker had an ammunition clip of eight [[Slug/Legends|slugs]]. Only a direct hit on a vital area was likely to kill a target. The Striker was readily available, even on planets with strict weapons regulations, and was favored by those in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EGWT" />

[[Huff Darklighter]] possessed a Striker pistol, and offered it as a reward to a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]]. The pistol was also favored by [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Agent/Legends|agents]]. At least one [[entertainer]] was known to possess this weapon, calling it ''Entertainer's Friend''.<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>
